hero.title: Secondary Market
hero.description: Manage share trading between shareholders with buy and sell offers in a secure, traceable, and fully digital environment.

features.title: Share trading between shareholders
features.description: Centralize secondary transactions and streamline the full flow: listing, acceptance, signing, and tracking.

items.title: Buy and sell offers
items.description: Publish buy or sell offers between shareholders with clear terms and defined rules.

items.title: Guided process
items.description: Execute transactions step by step with validations to reduce errors and operational friction.

items.title: Visible price and volume
items.description: View key secondary market information to support informed decisions between parties.

items.title: Full traceability
items.description: Record every transaction status for historical tracking and audit control.

items.title: Centralized documentation
items.description: Keep all transaction documents grouped and accessible in one place.

items.title: Cap table updates
items.description: After execution, reflect ownership changes in a structured and reliable way.
